# Shipment Advice Bill Auto Complete MRP

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:79caac3a8e3adb749fec3fc98ec60390511396c046303bd1613119d3a713e166

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This is a glue module between `mrp` and `shipment_advice_bill_auto_complete`

It fixes the computation of the quantity to invoices for kits.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice_bill_auto_complete_mrp.models.account_move.AccountMove._get_purchase_quantity_from_stock_move_line
documentation:
Product on move line does not correspond with product on purchase line.

Handle the quantity computation for specific cases (kits, ...)
